items.title: Rep Ilhan Omar's daughter strikes hard-core communist pose as mom battles claims she is rich

items.title: Republicans eye ending government shutdowns forever over fears Dems will do it again
items.description: Senate Republicans explore adding shutdown prevention measures to their budget reconciliation package as the DHS closure stretches past 60 days.
